summary: Keep Awake mode, a wider disk menu bar popover, and a more compact Results pie chart.
introduced: Keep Awake (Always on) prevents system and display sleep while DiskWise is running — toggle from Settings or the disk menu bar
Disk menu bar popover is wider with Keep Awake and drive toggles side by side
changed: Results pie chart is compact with category legend and details on the right when highlighted
Disk menu bar refresh button now shows the Refresh label like System Status
